IKUNAの次は、IKASAなのか！？いや、IKASAは、女性ユーザーへ向けた、新たなシリーズなのです。もちろん、急いで付け加えれば、男性ユーザーも、プロフェッショナルな男優の磨き上げた「ワザ」を、こっそり盗むのには、ドンピシャな内容でもあるんです！AV界にもチラホラ散見されるHOW TO物は数あれど、しかし、IKASAは、それらと一線を画す、正しく実践的な内容なんであります！つまり、IKUNAシリーズの「VS的」要素を取り入れて、女性側（今回は、乙アリス♡）が、好敵手同士のプロ男優を、女性目線で厳しく、正しく、ジャッジするという点が、類似のAV作品には見られない、ユニークかつ厳正な展開になっているということです！で、本作であります。乙アリスがジャッジするのは、「男優」矢野慎二（ヤノシンジ）VS日森一（ヒモリハジメ）。両者、いずれ甲乙つけ難い、巨根の持ち主なのですが（正しくは矢野君のほうがやや大きい）、それはそれとして＿＿、究極、接戦を制するのは、イカセのテクとセンシティブなハートの融合にあるのです。とりわけジックリと観ていただきたいのが、彼らの、アリスちゃんに接する一挙手一投足の、アプローチ。加えて、IKASEへと加速をつけていく熟練された動作なのであります。男の五感全てを使って、アリスちゃんの微細な反応をも見逃さない！その観察眼こそが、IKASEの真髄と言えるでしょう。言い換えれば、この作品を観るユーザーさんにも、実践可能な「ワザ」であるということなのです。ともあれ、乙アリスが最後に下す審判は、どのような結果を迎えるのでしょうか？

Melonbooks: https://www.melonbooks.co.jp/detail/detail.php?product_id=1951237

----

We started this project around late June 2023. It's been a long time since then, and to be honest, the only reason it took this long was because I kept starting other projects and working on other stuff instead of this one. We lost contact with the TL who provided us the script in-between then and now. I hope they're doing alright!

This is a collection of different episodes of Adventurer-chan's adventures. As per Adventure 3's end note, the "bad ends" are divergent routes from Adventurer-chan's Grand Adventure. I like Adventurer-chan's design a lot. She's quite cute! So are her friends, Swordswoman-chan and Fortune Teller-chan.

The last two comic pages are an afterword. Nobody wanted to TL those. We have not decided if we're going to do the rest of the series.

Here's a chapter breakdown if you're looking for specific content.

Page 2: Prologue
Page 5: Adventurer-chan gets pinned down by a giant slug and pumped full of its eggs.
Page 12: Adventurer-chan gets caught in a trap and gets kidnapped.
Page 17: Adventurer-chan gets turned into a seedbed.
Page 23: Adventurer-chan inhales an aphrodisiac and goes into heat for 3 days and nights.
Page 31: Adventurer-chan gets groped, sniffed, and touched all over by ruffians in a back alley.
Page 38: Adventurer-chan gets groped, sniffed, and touched all over by ruffians in a back alley, continued.
Page 44: Adventurer-chan gets covered head to toe in a strong aphrodesiac, goes into heat, and has sex with a guy she happened to come across.
Page 51: Adventurer-chan gets assaulted in her sleep and gets pregnant, but doesn't notice until she gives birth.
Page 61: Adventurer-chan runs into a pack of wild dogs in the woods at night and gets gang raped.
Page 72: Adventurer-chan gets pregnant with the child of a dog, and while she doesn't know what to do, she gets assaulted by the wild dogs again, and after they finish raping her, she gives birth to baby dogs.
Page 85: Adventurer-chan gets ambushed and paralyzed by the breast-sucking imp, who makes her tits bigger, then drains them.
Page 94: Adventurer-chan becomes fat from a peculiar curse.
Page 96: Fortune Teller-chan gets lost in a dungeon and eats a fruit she comes by which makes her fatter and fatter until she can't move.
Page 99: Adventurer-chan gets caught in a trap that turns her into a kid, and then has sex with a male party member in order to return to normal.
Page 110: Adventurer-chan gets hypnotized by an anal-loving middle-aged man and takes his special private lessons.
Page 117: Fortune Teller-chan goes into heat form a magical tool, has clothed sex multiple times, and gets pregnant.

I've read the word "Adventure" too many times now.
